text.title: Trunk-Based Dev Principles Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a TBD-readiness assessment by per-principle pass/fail to verdict adopt / partial-adopt / not-ready. Branches name observable scores; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are the prerequisites satisfied: repo handle, CI config, branching policy artefact accessible?

branch.when: prereqs_met == true AND single_trunk_score >= 15 AND small_commits_score < 15
prereqs_met == true AND single_trunk_score >= 15 AND small_commits_score >= 15 AND releasable_trunk_score < 15
prereqs_met == true AND single_trunk_score >= 15 AND small_commits_score >= 15 AND releasable_trunk_score >= 15 AND fast_ci_score < 15
prereqs_met == true AND single_trunk_score >= 15 AND small_commits_score >= 15 AND releasable_trunk_score >= 15 AND fast_ci_score >= 15

text.example: prereqs_met=true → single_trunk_score=24 → small_commits_score=22 → releasable_trunk_score=20 → fast_ci_score=11 (p50 13min) → verdict=partial-adopt (ref r4); fix CI before declaring adopted.
